subcodes.first_line: Glorified be God! By what tongue can man describe the Sun of Truth and offer praise through a single effulgence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحان الله بچه لسان انسان آفتاب حقیقت را وصف کند تا ستایش نماید بیک تجلی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for unity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @consolation and comfort, @transcendence; unknowability of God
